{
  "id": "aa40a94f-b8c4-49b6-b0d4-ccc9cd90944a",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "12.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].filter(yieldObj => yieldObj.apy !== undefined && !isNaN(yieldObj.apy) && yieldObj.apy > 0).sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nif (yields.length === 0) {\n    const defaultYield = { name: 'aave', apy: 0.01 };\n    yields.push(defaultYield);\n}\n\nconst distribution = (\n    yields.length <= 1 ? \n    {[yields[0]?.name || 'aave']: 100} : \n    yields.length <= 2 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 75, [yields[1].name]: 25} : \n    yields.length <= 3 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15} : \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15, [yields[3].name]: 5}\n);\n\nreturn distribution;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",

    },

      "name": "morpho_apy",
